visualizerParams.title: Recursive Bisection Method
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided bisection method uses an iterative `while` loop. Refactor it to use a recursive approach, which mirrors the mathematical definition of repeatedly halving the interval.

solution.explanation: The recursive bisection clearly expresses the divide-and-conquer nature of the algorithm. It checks the base cases (convergence or exact root) and then recursively searches the sub-interval that contains the sign change.
